name: 42_examshell
description: 42_examshell – Updated with New Subject Support  A practice exam shell for 42 school students to simulate the official exam environment. Now updated with a new subject and exercises through Rank 02, Rank 03, and Rank 04, helping you prepare more effectively for 42 exams.  🚀 Practice tool to sharpen your skills before the real exam  🆕 New subject
description_ja: 42_examshell – 新サブジェクト対応版。42 スクール生が公式試験環境をシミュレートするための練習用試験シェル。Rank 02・Rank 03・Rank 04 の新サブジェクトと演習を追加し、42 試験対策をより効果的に。本番前のスキル強化に役立つ練習ツール
